case_title: BAY WEST SHOWPLACE INVESTORS vs. KAMISH DESIGNS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED HEREIN AS DOE 1 TO BE SAM OAK CORPORATION
